purpose: ZIP containing ../evil.txt must fail archive security before OPF discovery.

generator.version_policy: Generator MUST produce byte-stable files from listed source_spec fields with fixed ordering, timestamps, compression, and UTF-8 encoding where applicable.

zip_entries.content: This entry must trigger archive traversal validation before OPF parsing.
The manifest is intentionally absent so archive security precedence is tested.

notes: Do not replace with implementation output unless the delta is reviewed as a contract change.
runtime input files are generated from this machine-readable source_spec; binary EPUB/ZIP files are never committed.
